creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Chase the upgrade of MPICH2. See PR ports/154714.

Fix: Apply the hereunder patches.

diff -urN science/mbdyn.orig/Makefile science/mbdyn/Makefile
--- science/mbdyn.orig/Makefile	2010-11-14 23:00:15.000000000 +0100
+++ science/mbdyn/Makefile	2011-02-06 22:27:40.000000000 +0100
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	mbdyn
 PORTVERSION=	1.3.9
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTREVISION=	3
 CATEGORIES=	science
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.aero.polimi.it/~masarati/Download/mbdyn/
 
--- mbdyn.diff ends here ---
